subsection.heading: Grant Authority.—
subsection.content: The Secretary shall make a grant to an appropriate entity for promoting public education and awareness with respect to the 811 national excavation damage prevention phone number.

subsection.heading: Authorization of Appropriations.—
subsection.content: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary $1,000,000 for the period beginning October 1, 2006, and ending September 30, 2008, to carry out this section.
